title: Gray (disambiguation)
content:
'''Gray''' or '''grey''' can refer to the following:

[[File:Stealth_operations_clone_trooper.png|thumb|right|250px|The gray armor of a [[Special ops clone trooper/Legends|stealth operations clone trooper]]]]

The [[Color/Legends|color]] '''gray''' or '''grey'''.
